name: Cazuela De Chorizo
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon Thyme (fresh), finely chopped OR 1 pinch Dried Thyme
7 chorizo links or 7 spicy sausage links
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onion, garlic, thyme (or dried thyme), and bay leaf; cook, stirring until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
3. Add chorizo or sausage; sauté until golden brown, about 4 minutes.
4. Stir in paprika and flour to coat the meat.
5. Cook for 2-3 minutes, then add wine; let it evaporate briefly.
6. Stir in tomato sauce and water. Lower heat and simmer gently, uncovered, until the sauce coats the meat, about 5 minutes.
7. Serve hot over boiled potatoes. Sprinkle with parsley.
